sentences.sentence: Not too long ago many investors made the bet that renewable fuels from bio-mass would be the next big thing in energy.
sentences.translation: 不久前，许多投资者曾押注，源自生物质的可再生燃料将成为能源领域的下一个大热门。

structure.text: that renewable fuels from bio-mass would be the next big thing in energy

difficult_points: not too long ago 表示“不久前”。
make a bet that... 表示“打赌、押注……”，that 从句说明所押注的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Converting corn, sugarcane, and soybeans into ethanol or diesel-type fuels lessens our nation's dependence on oil imports while cutting carbon dioxide emissions.
sentences.translation: 把玉米、甘蔗和大豆转化为乙醇或柴油型燃料，既能降低我们国家对进口石油的依赖，也能减少二氧化碳排放。

structure.text: Converting corn, sugarcane, and soybeans into ethanol or diesel-type fuels
our nation's dependence on oil imports

difficult_points: 句子主语是动名词短语 Converting...fuels，而不是 corn 等具体作物。
while cutting... 是省略主语的伴随状语，表示降低石油依赖的同时也减少了碳排放。

sentences.sentence: But already the nascent industry faces challenges.
sentences.translation: 但这个新兴产业已经面临挑战。
difficult_points: but 承接上文的转折。
already 插入在主语之前，修饰谓语 faces，强调“已经”。
nascent 意为“新兴的、刚起步的”。

sentences.sentence: Escalating demand is hiking food prices while farmers clear rainforest habitats to grow fuel crops.
sentences.translation: 不断攀升的需求正在推高食品价格，与此同时，农民们为了种植能源作物而砍伐雨林栖息地。

structure.text: while farmers clear rainforest habitats to grow fuel crops

difficult_points: escalating 是现在分词作定语，修饰 demand，表示“不断攀升的需求”。
while 引导时间状语从句，说明食品价格上涨的同时发生的另一现象。
to grow fuel crops 不定式表示农民砍伐雨林的目的。

sentences.sentence: And several recent studies say that certain biofuel-production processes either fail to yield net energy gains or release more carbon dioxide than they use.
sentences.translation: 而且，几项最新研究表明，某些生物燃料生产工艺要么无法产生净能量收益，要么排放的二氧化碳反而超过其消耗量。

structure.text: that certain biofuel-production processes either fail to yield net energy gains or release more carbon dioxide than they use
fail to yield net energy gains

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 say 的宾语。
either...or... 连接两种并列的负面结果。
than they use 是比较状语从句，比较“释放的二氧化碳”与“消耗量”。

sentences.sentence: A successor tier of start-up ventures aims to avoid those problems.
sentences.translation: 新一批创业公司力图避免这些问题。

structure.text: A successor tier of start-up ventures

difficult_points: a successor tier of 指“新一批、后续一批”，紧随其后的一批创业公司。
those problems 指代上一段提到的种种问题。

sentences.sentence: Rather than focusing on the starches, sugars, and fats of food crops, many of the prototype bioethanol processes work with lignocellulose, the "woody" tissue that strengthens the cell walls of plants, says University of Massachusetts Amherst chemical engineer George W. Huber.
sentences.translation: 马萨诸塞大学阿默斯特分校的化学工程师乔治·W·休伯（George W. Huber）表示，许多原型生物乙醇工艺并不聚焦于粮食作物中的淀粉、糖分和脂肪，而是采用木质纤维素——一种强化植物细胞壁的“木质”组织。

structure.text: Rather than focusing on the starches, sugars, and fats of food crops
many of the prototype bioethanol processes
that strengthens the cell walls of plants
says University of Massachusetts Amherst chemical engineer George W. Huber

difficult_points: rather than doing 表示“不是……而是……”，与后面 work with 形成对照。
the "woody" tissue 是 lignocellulose 的同位语，说明其性质。
that strengthens the cell walls of plants 是定语从句，修饰 tissue。
says... 是句末的转述标签，谓语 says 提前于主语 George W. Huber。

sentences.sentence: Although cellulose breaks down less easily than sugars and starches and thus requires a complex series of enzyme-driven chemical reactions, its use opens the industry to nonfood plant feedstocks such as agricultural wastes, wood chips, and switchgrass.
sentences.translation: 尽管纤维素比糖和淀粉更难分解，因而需要一系列复杂的酶促化学反应，但使用纤维素能让这一产业转向非粮食类植物原料，例如农业废弃物、木屑和柳枝稷。

structure.text: Although cellulose breaks down less easily than sugars and starches
and thus requires a complex series of enzyme-driven chemical reactions
opens the industry to nonfood plant feedstocks
such as agricultural wastes, wood chips, and switchgrass

difficult_points: although 引导让步状语从句，breaks down 和 requires 是并列谓语，共享主语 cellulose。
its use 中 its 指代 cellulose。
such as 列举 nonfood plant feedstocks 的具体例子。

sentences.sentence: But no company has yet demonstrated a cost-competitive industrial process for making cellulosic biofuels.
sentences.translation: 但截至目前，还没有一家公司证明了一套具有成本竞争力的纤维素生物燃料工业化生产工艺。
difficult_points: no company...has yet demonstrated 是否定+完成时结构，强调“迄今为止都还没有”。
for making cellulosic biofuels 是介词短语作后置定语，修饰 process，说明用途。

sentences.sentence: So scientists and engineers are working on dozens of possible biofuel-processing routes, reports Charles Wyman, a chemical engineer at the University of California, Riverside, who is a founder of Mascoma Corporation in Cambridge, Mass., a leading developer of cellulosic ethanol processing."
sentences.translation: 因此，科学家和工程师们正在研究数十种可能的生物燃料加工路线，加州大学河滨分校化学工程师、马斯科马公司（Mascoma Corporation）创始人查尔斯·怀曼（Charles Wyman）如是说；该公司是纤维素乙醇加工领域的领先开发商。

structure.text: are working on dozens of possible biofuel-processing routes
a chemical engineer at the University of California, Riverside
who is a founder of Mascoma Corporation in Cambridge, Mass.
a leading developer of cellulosic ethanol processing

difficult_points: reports Charles Wyman 是主谓倒装的转述标签，正常语序为 Charles Wyman reports。
who is a founder of... 是定语从句，修饰 Charles Wyman，补充说明其身份。
句末的引号是原文排版遗留的痕迹，与下一句共同构成一段引语。

sentences.sentence: There's no miracle process out there," he remarks.
sentences.translation: “根本不存在什么万能的神奇工艺，”他说道。

structure.text: There's no miracle process out there

difficult_points: there's no miracle process 是存在句，miracle process 比喻“一劳永逸的完美工艺”。
he 指代前一句提到的 Charles Wyman。

sentences.sentence: And fine-tuning a process involves considerable money and time.
sentences.translation: 而且，对一种工艺进行精细打磨需要投入大量的资金和时间。
difficult_points: fine-tuning a process 是动名词短语作主语，指“对某种工艺进行精细调整”。
and 承接上一句，与之构成并列关系，进一步补充信息。
considerable money and time 强调投入的资金和时间数额都相当可观。

sentences.sentence: "The oil companies say that it takes 10 years to fully commercialize an industrial processing route," warns Huber, who has contributed some thermochemical techniques to another biomass start-up, Virent Energy Systems in Madison, Wis.
sentences.translation: “石油公司常说，一条工业化生产路线要完全实现商业化需要10年时间，”休伯警告道；他还曾为另一家生物质创业公司——位于威斯康星州麦迪逊市的维伦特能源系统公司（Virent Energy Systems）——贡献过一些热化学技术。

structure.text: that it takes 10 years to fully commercialize an industrial processing route
who has contributed some thermochemical techniques to another biomass start-up
Virent Energy Systems in Madison, Wis.

difficult_points: it takes...to do 是固定句型，表示“做某事需要花费……时间”。
warns Huber 主谓倒装，正常语序为 Huber warns。
who 引导定语从句，补充说明休伯与另一家生物质创业公司的关系。

sentences.sentence: One promising biofuel procedure that avoids the complex enzymatic chemistry to break down cellulose is now being explored by Coskata in Warrenville, Ill., a firm launched in 2006 by high-profile investors and entrepreneurs (General Motors recently took a minority stake in it as well).
sentences.translation: 科斯卡塔公司（Coskata）总部位于伊利诺伊州沃伦维尔，目前正在探索一种有望避开复杂酶促化学反应来分解纤维素的生物燃料工艺；该公司由多位知名投资者和企业家于2006年创立（通用汽车最近也持有其少数股权）。

structure.text: that avoids the complex enzymatic chemistry
a firm launched in 2006 by high-profile investors and entrepreneurs
General Motors recently took a minority stake in it as well

difficult_points: that avoids...是定语从句，修饰 procedure，to break down cellulose 是不定式修饰 chemistry，说明这种化学反应的用途。
is now being explored 是现在进行时的被动语态。
括号内容是插入的补充说明，it 指代 Coskata 公司。

sentences.sentence: In the Coskata operation, a conventional gasification system will use heat to turn various feedstocks into a mixture of carbon monoxide and hydrogen called syngas, says Richard Tobey, vice president of Engineering and R&D.
sentences.translation: 工程与研发副总裁理查德·托贝（Richard Tobey）介绍，在科斯卡塔的工艺流程中，一套常规气化系统会利用高温将各种原料转化为一氧化碳和氢气的混合物，即所谓的合成气（syngas）。

structure.text: to turn various feedstocks into a mixture of carbon monoxide and hydrogen
vice president of Engineering and R&D

difficult_points: turn A into B 表示“把A转化为B”。
called syngas 是过去分词短语，修饰 a mixture of carbon monoxide and hydrogen，说明这种混合气体的名称。
says Richard Tobey 主谓倒装。

sentences.sentence: The ability to handle multiple plant feedstocks would boost the flexibility of the overall process because each region in the country has access to certain feedstocks but not others.
sentences.translation: 能够处理多种植物原料的能力，将提升整个工艺流程的灵活性，因为全国各地区所能获取的原料种类各不相同。

structure.text: the flexibility of the overall process
because each region in the country has access to certain feedstocks but not others

difficult_points: to handle multiple plant feedstocks 是不定式作后置定语，修饰 ability。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释为什么处理多种原料的能力能提升灵活性。
but not others 省略了 has access to，完整意思是“但无法获取其他原料”。

sentences.sentence: Instead of using thermochemical methods to convert the syngas to fuel- a process that can be significantly more costly because of the added expense of pressurizing gases, according to Tobey – the Coskata group chose a biochemical route.
sentences.translation: 科斯卡塔团队没有采用热化学方法把合成气转化为燃料——据托贝介绍，由于加压气体会增加额外成本，这种方法明显更昂贵——而是选择了生物化学路线。

structure.text: Instead of using thermochemical methods to convert the syngas to fuel
a process that can be significantly more costly because of the added expense of pressurizing gases
that can be significantly more costly
because of the added expense of pressurizing gases

difficult_points: instead of doing 表示“没有采取……的做法”，与后文 chose 形成对照。
a process that...是对前面“用热化学方法转化合成气”这一做法的同位语说明，指出其成本更高的原因。
according to Tobey 是插入语，说明这一判断的信息来源。

sentences.sentence: The group focused on five promising strains of ethanol-excreting bacteria that Ralph Tanner, a microbiologist at the University of Oklahoma, had discovered years before in the oxygen-free sediments of a swamp.
sentences.translation: 该团队聚焦于五种有望产乙醇的细菌菌株，这些菌株是俄克拉荷马大学微生物学家拉尔夫·坦纳（Ralph Tanner）多年前在一处沼泽的无氧沉积物中发现的。

structure.text: five promising strains of ethanol-excreting bacteria
that Ralph Tanner, a microbiologist at the University of Oklahoma, had discovered years before in the oxygen-free sediments of a swamp
a microbiologist at the University of Oklahoma

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句，修饰 bacteria，从句主语 Ralph Tanner 后插入同位语补充其身份。
had discovered 是过去完成时，表示“发现”这一动作发生在“聚焦研究”之前。

sentences.sentence: These anaerobic bugs make ethanol by voraciously consuming syngas.
sentences.translation: 这些厌氧菌通过大量吞噬合成气来产生乙醇。
difficult_points: bugs 在此口语化地指代“细菌”，而非通常意义上的“虫子”。
by doing sth 表示“通过做某事的方式”。

sentences.sentence: The "heart and soul of the Coskata process," as Tobey puts it, is the bioreactor in which the bacteria live.
sentences.translation: 用托贝的话说，“科斯卡塔工艺的核心与灵魂”正是那个供细菌栖居的生物反应器。

structure.text: The "heart and soul of the Coskata process,"

difficult_points: "heart and soul" 是习语，意为“核心、灵魂”。
as Tobey puts it 是插入语，puts it 中 it 指代前面的说法。
in which the bacteria live 是“介词+关系代词”引导的定语从句，修饰 bioreactor。

sentences.sentence: "Rather than searching for food in the fermentation mash in a large tank, our bacteria wait for the gas to be delivered to them," he explains.
sentences.translation: 他解释道：“我们的细菌不会在大型反应罐的发酵浆液里四处觅食，而是等待气体被输送到它们身边。”

structure.text: Rather than searching for food in the fermentation mash in a large tank

difficult_points: rather than doing 与主句形成对照，说明这些细菌不主动觅食，而是等待气体送达。
wait for sth to be delivered 中不定式的被动式表示“等待某物被送来”。

sentences.sentence: The firm relies on plastic tubes, the filter-fabric straws as thin as human hair.
sentences.translation: 该公司采用的是塑料管——细如发丝的过滤纤维“吸管”。
difficult_points: rely on 表示“依赖、依靠”。
the filter-fabric straws 是 plastic tubes 的同位语，进一步说明这些塑料管的材质与形态。
as thin as human hair 用比较结构形容这些“吸管”极细。

sentences.sentence: The syngas flows through the straws, and water is pumped across their exteriors.
sentences.translation: 合成气在这些吸管内部流动，水则被泵送流经它们的外壁。

structure.text: and water is pumped across their exteriors

difficult_points: 两个分句由 and 连接，分别描述合成气与水在系统中不同的流动路径。
their 指代 the straws。

sentences.sentence: The gases diffuse across the selective membrane to the bacteria embedded in the outer surface of the tubes, which permits no water inside.
sentences.translation: 气体分子扩散穿过这层选择性薄膜，到达嵌在吸管外表面的细菌那里；这层薄膜不允许水进入内部。

structure.text: embedded in the outer surface of the tubes

difficult_points: diffuse across 表示“扩散穿过”，描述气体分子的运动。
embedded in the outer surface of the tubes 是过去分词短语，修饰 bacteria，说明细菌镶嵌的位置。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代 the selective membrane，说明这层选择性膜只透气不透水的特性。

sentences.sentence: "We get an efficient mass transfer with the tubes, which is not easy," Tobey says.
sentences.translation: 托贝说：“借助这些吸管，我们实现了高效的传质，而这并不容易做到。”
difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面“通过这些吸管实现高效传质”这件事整体，而非某个具体名词。
mass transfer 是专业术语，指“传质”（物质在介质间的转移过程）。

sentences.sentence: "Our data suggest that in an optimal setting we could get 90 percent of the energy value of the gases into our fuel."After the bugs eat the gases, they release ethanol into the surrounding water.
sentences.translation: “我们的数据表明，在最理想的条件下，我们能把气体中90%的能量值转化进我们的燃料里。”细菌吞食这些气体之后，会把乙醇释放到周围的水中。

structure.text: that in an optimal setting we could get 90 percent of the energy value of the gases into our fuel
After the bugs eat the gases
they release ethanol into the surrounding water

difficult_points: 原文此处引号后与 After 之间缺少空格和句子边界标记，属原文排版遗留问题；实际是两句独立的话。
in an optimal setting 表示“在最理想的条件下”。
After the bugs eat the gases 中 bugs 承接前文，仍指代细菌。

sentences.sentence: Standard distillation or filtration techniques could extract the alcohol from the water.
sentences.translation: 常规的蒸馏或过滤技术就能把乙醇从水中提取出来。
difficult_points: distillation 和 filtration 是两种可选的分离技术，蒸馏和过滤。
the alcohol 在此即指前文提到的 ethanol。

sentences.sentence: Coskata researchers estimate that their commercialized process could deliver ethanol at under $1 per gallon-less than half of today's $2-per-gallon wholesale price, Tobey claims.
sentences.translation: 科斯卡塔的研究人员估计，他们的商业化工艺能以每加仑不到1美元的成本供应乙醇——不到目前每加仑2美元批发价的一半，托贝如是说。

structure.text: that their commercialized process could deliver ethanol at under $1 per gallon
less than half of today's $2-per-gallon wholesale price

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，作 estimate 的宾语。
less than half of... 是对“每加仑低于1美元”这一价格的进一步说明，与当前批发价对比。
Tobey claims 是句末插入的转述标签。

sentences.sentence: Outside evaluators of Argonne National Laboratory measured the input-output "energy balance" of the Coskata process and found that, optimally, it can produce 7.7 times as much energy in the end product as it takes to make it.
sentences.translation: 阿贡国家实验室的外部评估人员测算了科斯卡塔工艺的投入产出“能量平衡”，发现在最理想情况下，最终产品所含的能量可达到制造它所耗能量的7.7倍。

structure.text: Outside evaluators of Argonne National Laboratory
the input-output "energy balance" of the Coskata process
that, optimally, it can produce 7.7 times as much energy in the end product as it takes to make it
as it takes to make it

difficult_points: measured 和 found 是并列谓语，共享主语 Outside evaluators。
N times as much...as... 是倍数比较句型，意为“是……的N倍”。
as it takes to make it 中第一个 it 指代终产品，第二个 it 指代该工艺过程本身。

sentences.sentence: The company plans to construct a 40,000-gallon-a-year pilot plant near the GM test track in Milford, Mich., by the end of this year and hopes to build a full-scale, 100-million-gallon-a-year plant by 2011.
sentences.translation: 该公司计划在今年年底前，于密歇根州米尔福德通用汽车测试跑道附近建成一座年产4万加仑的中试工厂，并希望在2011年前建成一座全面规模、年产1亿加仑的工厂。

structure.text: to construct a 40,000-gallon-a-year pilot plant near the GM test track in Milford, Mich.
by the end of this year
to build a full-scale, 100-million-gallon-a-year plant by 2011

difficult_points: plans 和 hopes 是并列谓语，分别接不定式说明近期和远期目标。
40,000-gallon-a-year 和 100-million-gallon-a-year 是复合形容词，分别修饰 pilot plant 和 plant，表示年产能。

sentences.sentence: Coskata may have some company by then; Bioengineering Resources in Fayetteville, Ark., is already developing what seems to be a similar three-step pathway in which syngas is consumed by bacteria isolated by James Gaddy, a retired chemical engineer at the University of Arkansas.
sentences.translation: 届时科斯卡塔可能不会是唯一一家这么做的公司：位于阿肯色州费耶特维尔的生物工程资源公司（Bioengineering Resources）也已经在开发一条看似相似的三步工艺路径，利用阿肯色大学退休化学工程师詹姆斯·加迪（James Gaddy）分离出的细菌来消耗合成气。

structure.text: Coskata may have some company by then
what seems to be a similar three-step pathway
in which syngas is consumed by bacteria
a retired chemical engineer at the University of Arkansas

difficult_points: have company 是习语，意为“有伴、不孤单”，此处比喻届时不会只有科斯卡塔一家公司在做这件事。
what seems to be... 是宾语从句，作 developing 的宾语。
in which syngas is consumed by bacteria 是“介词+关系代词”定语从句，修饰 pathway；isolated by James Gaddy 是过去分词短语，修饰 bacteria。

sentences.sentence: Considering the advances in these and other methods, plant cellulose could provide the greener ethanol everyone wants.
sentences.translation: 考虑到这些及其他工艺路径的进展，植物纤维素或许真能提供人人期待的更环保乙醇。

structure.text: Considering the advances in these and other methods

difficult_points: considering 是分词短语作状语，意为“考虑到……”。
everyone wants 省略了关系代词，修饰 the greener ethanol。
